title: 8 Things a Real Brotherhood Does
caption:
A group chat is not a brotherhood.

A real brotherhood shows up in person when it counts. Asks the question you keep dodging. Knows your actual sin, not just your highlight reel. Prays with you out loud, not just sends a thinking-of-you text.

It calls you out before you wreck it — not after. Carries the silence when the season doesn't need advice. Tells you the truth and stays anyway.

And it points you back to God, not just to itself.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16

Tag the brother who does number 7.
